name: Bean Loaf
recipeIngredient: finely chopped vegetables (e.g., onion, yellow peppers, red peppers, green peppers, celery)
3 tbsp Country-style dijon mustard (such as Grey Poupon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the kidney beans into a paste.
2. Add the mustard and molasses to the mashed beans, mixing well.
3. Chop your desired vegetables and garlic, then add them to the mixture.
4. Combine the cooked brown rice with the bean mixture.
5. Transfer the mixture to a greased loaf pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes (or until fully baked).
7. Optionally, serve with mushroom gravy on top.
